code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test14-OCT-2016Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, low CO₂, and significant proteinuria and glucosuria, with cloudy, brown urine of low specific gravity. These findings suggest impaired renal function, possibly chronic kidney disease with tubular dysfunction (e.g., Fanconi syndrome or diabetic nephropathy). No evidence of urinary tract infection is present. Further nephrological evaluation is recommended.

coding.display: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus

Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
